title: Tokens — Panda CSS Docs
insights: CSS-in-JS with atomic CSS at build time. Three token types: primitive (raw), semantic (contextual), component (scoped). Auto-generates CSS variables --colors-primary, --spacing-4. TypeScript strict mode. Semantic tokens as conditional values per context

title: chakra-ui/panda GitHub
insights: 7k+ stars. Type-safe CSS-in-JS framework for design systems. Design tokens as first-class concept. Zero runtime overhead, static CSS generation

title: vanilla-extract — Zero-Runtime Stylesheets in TypeScript
insights: TypeScript design tokens with static CSS output. Type-safe theme contracts (createThemeContract). Multiple themes via CSS custom properties. Sprinkles API = type-safe Tailwind equivalent. Zero runtime

title: Theme Tokens — Stitches Docs
insights: Tokens auto-map to most appropriate CSS scale. CSS variables under-the-hood. Smooth developer experience for token consumption. Scale-aware design system

title: Theming — shadcn/ui Docs
insights: --primary, --background, --foreground CSS variables as token system. tailwind.cssVariables=true enables CSS var mode. Tailwind v4 CLI support. HSL → OKLCH migration in progress. Three-layer variable structure: re-theme by changing semantic layer only

title: Tailwind v4 — shadcn/ui Docs
insights: shadcn/ui updated for Tailwind v4 @theme directive. All components updated. HSL colors converted to OKLCH. @theme inline option support

title: Myndex/SAPC-APCA GitHub — APCA Algorithm
insights: APCA (Accessible Perceptual Contrast Algorithm) for WCAG 3. Replaces WCAG 2 luminance ratio with perceptually uniform scoring 0-100+. Context-aware: font size+weight affect score. Lc15=min non-text, Lc30=min text, Lc60=body text. Background-aware

title: Myndex/apca-w3 GitHub — W3C APCA Version
insights: APCA version licensed for W3C/AGWG use. The algorithm that will underpin WCAG 3.0 color contrast. Essential for accessible token color generation

title: WCAG 3.0 Introduces New Contrast Method — Designsystemet
insights: Norwegian design system on WCAG 3 + APCA adoption. Color token system guarantees contrast regardless of brand color inputs. Practical guidance for government scale

title: Material Design 3 — Color Accessibility
insights: Dynamic color is accessible by default through tonal palette system. On-color tokens guarantee contrast with paired container tokens. Reference model for accessible dynamic color systems

title: Animation/Motion Design Tokens for Complex Design Systems — Oscar Gonzalez
insights: Motion token anatomy: trigger, duration, easing, property. Encapsulating easing+duration into intent-named tokens. Choreography vs individual animation tokens. Scalable motion system design

title: Motion — Seeds Design System (Sprout Social)
insights: Production motion token system. Fast/normal/slow duration tokens. Semantic easing curve names. Real-world motion token implementation from SaaS product

title: apcach — Evil Martians APCA Tool
insights: APCA-based contrast checker and color adjustment tool for accessible color token generation. Part of Evil Martians OKLCH ecosystem

title: Managing Design Tokens Using Storybook — DEV Community
insights: Storybook Design Token addon parses CSS/SASS to generate token docs. Token PR + Chromatic visual regression = controlled loop. Storybook 8.5+ automated visual testing

title: Storybook Design Token Addon
insights: Displays token docs generated from stylesheets and icon files. Renders examples of token values. CSS/SASS parsing integration

title: What Are Design Tokens? — CSS-Tricks
insights: Canonical introductory reference. Platform-agnostic representation of design decisions. CSS variables as implementation layer. Foundational reading still widely cited

title: sturobson/Awesome-Design-Tokens GitHub
insights: Curated list: tools, articles, implementations, conferences. Community-maintained. Primary discovery resource for the entire token ecosystem

title: Diez — The Design Token Framework
insights: TypeScript token composition → native packages for iOS/Android/Web. Novel open-source compiler. Enterprise beta testers: Atlassian, Cisco, Patreon, P&G. Last major update 2020, now superseded by Style Dictionary v4

title: diez/diez GitHub
insights: TypeScript-first design token framework. Open source MIT. Cross-platform compiler. Historical reference for the evolution of token tooling

title: CSS Variables Guide: Design Tokens and Theming 2025 — FrontendTools
insights: 2025-2026: CSS variables form foundation of scalable design systems. Dynamic theming + consistent UI architecture for enterprise products. CSS + tokens convergence patterns

title: Design Tokens: The Foundation of Your UI Architecture — Feature-Sliced Design
insights: Tokens as first-class architectural artifact makes design system scalable not fragile. Architectural thinking beyond just tooling. Feb 2026

title: The Essential Principles of Scalable Token Architecture — Supernova
insights: Scalable token architecture principles from Supernova. Naming conventions, deprecation strategies, tier separation, documentation requirements for enterprise-scale systems

title: Design Token Management Tools 2025: Complete Guide to 15 Best Solutions
insights: Comprehensive comparison of 15 tools: Tokens Studio, Style Dictionary, Supernova, Specify, Zeroheight, Knapsack, Backlight, and more. Pricing, features, use cases

title: Implementing Light and Dark Mode with Style Dictionary — Always Twisted
insights: Step-by-step tutorial: Style Dictionary multi-mode setup. Separate light/dark token JSON files. CSS output with prefers-color-scheme. Practical workflow guide

title: postcss-design-tokens — csstools/postcss-plugins GitHub
insights: @design-tokens at-rule to import design tokens in CSS. @csstools/postcss-design-tokens. Style Dictionary format support. Declarative token usage in CSS source files

title: Token CSS — Design Tokens in CSS Workflow
insights: Defines tokens in JSON, authors CSS using token names as values → auto-converted to custom properties. Astro integration + PostCSS plugin. Following DTCG spec (breaking changes expected)

title: Structuring Design Tokens for Interactive States — Francesco Improta
insights: Token structure for hover/focus/active/disabled/selected states. State tokens as modifiers on semantic tokens. Best-practice patterns for interactive UI tokens

title: Decoding Compound Tokens — Francesco Improta
insights: DTCG composite tokens (typography, shadow, border, transition, gradient). When to use compound vs individual tokens. Serialization and usage patterns

title: One Token, One Value — Francesco Improta
insights: Design principle: each token = exactly one value. Against multi-value tokens. Clarity, predictability, debuggability. Token architecture principle

title: Design Tokens and Variables — Francesco Improta
insights: Clarifies conceptual difference: tokens = design decisions as data, CSS variables = runtime implementation. Not the same thing but closely related

title: Mastering Typography with Semantic Tokens and Responsive Scaling — UX Collective
insights: Fluid typography using semantic tokens + CSS clamp. Token-driven responsive scaling without breakpoints. Font-size, line-height, letter-spacing token structure at scale

title: Responsive Tokens — Universal Design Systems
insights: Tokens that change based on viewport context. CSS clamp-based fluid spacing tokens. Universal design system architecture supporting responsive token values

title: salesforce-ux/design-system-ios GitHub
insights: Salesforce Lightning Design tokens for iOS. Cross-platform token implementation reference. Shows how JSON tokens transform to Swift/ObjC values

title: Design Tokens — California Design System (CA.gov)
insights: Government design system token implementation. Accessible, accessible, accessible. Public sector token use case with mandated compliance requirements

title: TokiForge/tokiforge GitHub
insights: Runtime theme switching for React/Vue/Svelte/Angular. CSS custom properties. <3KB, type-safe, framework-agnostic. Modern alternative to heavy theming solutions

title: Design Tokens — Mozilla Protocol Design System
insights: Mozilla's production design token system. Color, typography, spacing tokens for Firefox product family. Cross-platform token implementation at scale

title: Design Tokens Beyond Colors, Typography and Spacing — Bumble Tech
insights: Extending tokens to: motion, z-index, border-radius, opacity, grid. Tokens for every design decision not just the obvious ones. Broad token taxonomy from production system

title: Evolution of Design System Tokens: 2025 Deep Dive — Design Systems Collective
insights: 2025 next-generation Figma variable structures. New types, scopes, conditional logic in Figma variables. Design system token evolution analysis

title: klaufel/awesome-design-systems GitHub
insights: Curated list including design token tools: Style Dictionary, Figmagic, Token Validator, token resources. Broader design system context

title: SLDS Design Tokens — Salesforce LWC Developer Guide
insights: SLDS 2 replaces design tokens with global styling hooks (CSS custom vars). SLDS 2 separates structure from visual design. Styling hooks = deeper customization/theming
